tasks.title: Diagnose & fix Codex config.toml quoting + silent provider fallback (#115)
tasks.notes: Added throw on unknown provider string (getProvider) + TOML validity test. Original reporter's malformed bytes likely from raw PowerShell here-string — composePermissionConfig path retained (per NOTE 1) since root cause couldn't be reproduced with mocked fs; deferred to actual Windows install smoke test.

tasks.title: Fix statusline not clearing after remove_member (#39)
tasks.notes: writeStatusline() now clears statusline.txt and resets statusline-state.json on zero agents. Added tests/statusline.test.ts using APRA_FLEET_DATA_DIR to sandbox real fs.

tasks.title: Switch claude resume from -r <id> to -c (#108)
tasks.notes: ClaudeProvider.buildPromptCommand emits ' -c' when sessionId is present; buildResumeFlag helper retained for Gemini. Tests updated in tests/providers.test.ts.
